argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const query = '{{ query }}'; const max = {{ max }} || 20; const keywords = query.split(',').map(k => k.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean); const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com' }; let attempts = 0; while (attempts < 10) { const convs = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="conversation"]'); if (convs.length > 0) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); attempts++; } for (let scroll = 0; scroll < 10; scroll++) { const convs = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="conversation"]'); if (convs.length >= max + 5) break; if (convs.length > 0) { convs[convs.length - 1].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'instant', block: 'end' }); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); } const results = []; let accepted = 0; const conversations = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="conversation"]'); for (const conv of conversations) { if (accepted >= max) break; const preview = (conv.innerText || '').toLowerCase(); const lines = (conv.innerText || '').split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()); const user = lines[0] || 'unknown'; const matches = keywords.length === 0 || keywords.some(k => preview.includes(k)); if (!matches) { results.push({ index: accepted + 1, status: 'skipped', user, message: 'No keyword match' }); continue; } conv.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); const dmHeader = document.querySelector('[data-testid="conversation-header"], [data-testid="DM-conversation-header"]'); const chatUser = dmHeader ? dmHeader.innerText.trim().split('\n')[0] : user; const chatArea = document.querySelector('[data-testid="DmScrollerContainer"], [data-testid="DMConversationBody"], main'); const chatText = chatArea ? chatArea.innerText : ''; const matchedKw = keywords.filter(k => chatText.toLowerCase().includes(k)); if (matchedKw.length === 0) { results.push({ index: accepted + 1, status: 'skipped', user: chatUser, message: 'No keyword match in full content' }); continue; } const allBtns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="button"]')); const acceptBtn = allBtns.find(btn => { const t = btn.innerText.trim().toLowerCase(); return t === 'accept' || t === '接受'; }); if (!acceptBtn) { results.push({ index: accepted + 1, status: 'skipped', user: chatUser, message: 'No Accept button (already accepted?)' }); continue; } acceptBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const btnsAfter = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="button"]')); const confirmBtn = btnsAfter.find(btn => { const t = btn.innerText.trim().toLowerCase(); return (t === 'accept' || t === '接受') && btn !== acceptBtn; }); if (confirmBtn) { confirmBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } accepted++; results.push({ index: accepted, status: 'accepted', user: chatUser, message: 'Accepted! Matched: ' + matchedKw.join(', ') }); break; } if (results.length === 0) { results.push({ index: 0, status: 'info', user: 'System', message: 'No requests found or no keyword matches' }); } return { results }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ index: 0, status: 'error', user: '', message: intermediate.error }]; return intermediate.results || []; }
